# `draw.elliottCorrectionWave`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.3
> **Bucket:** `polylines`
> **Wire kind:** `elliott-correction-wave`

Draw an Elliott three-wave A-B-C correction through 3 world anchors
`[A, B, C]`. The renderer strokes the connecting legs (A-B, B-C) and
labels each pivot. Pass `opts.labels` to override the default
`["A", "B", "C"]` labels.

## Anchors

`anchors` — `[A, B, C]`

Anchor count: 3.

## Signature

```ts
function elliottCorrectionWave(anchors: AnchorTriple, opts?: LineDrawStyle): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `draw.elliottCorrectionWave(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.elliottCorrectionWave demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ bar, draw }) {
            draw.elliottCorrectionWave([
                { time: bar.time, price: bar.high },
                { time: bar.time + 30_000, price: bar.low },
                { time: bar.time + 60_000, price: bar.close },
            ]);
        },
    });
```
